text: The course is more an exercise in flexing Ivy vernacular than it is actually teaching . The learning curve is too steep to be useful to the majority of potential registrants . You ' re interested in this course either to ( a ) learn something about an exciting and ever changing field and / or ( b ) to have the Stanford logo on your LinkedIn profile . In both cases , move on . The curve is far too steep to be useful or to merit the countless additional hours of background learning the course should have done to bridge the gap .
